title: It Is The Printer's Fault.
content:
In Mrs. Potter's latest play
    The costuming is fine;
    Her waist is made decollete--
    Her skirt is new design.
meaning:
Eugene Field's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "It Is The Printer's Fault."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
